ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Cream and similar, fat content unknown (average)
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Espinafre (62%), molho bechamel (38%) [leite, nata (leite)), água, amido de milho, manteiga (leite), queijo (leite), sumo de limão, sal, cebola, noz-moscada, louro e pimenta branca].
